subject: Geography
title: The Svalbard Seed Vault
description: One-minute skill: The Svalbard Seed Vault.

hook.text: Deep inside an Arctic mountain, a vault holds over 1.2 million seed samples from around the world.

buildup.text: The Svalbard Global Seed Vault stores crop seeds as insurance against famine and disaster.

discovery.text: Permafrost keeps the vault naturally frozen, protecting seeds even if the power fails.

twist.text: In 2015, Syria withdrew seeds from Svalbard to rebuild a gene bank destroyed by war.

climax.text: A cave in the Arctic safeguards humanity's food supply against any catastrophe.

punchline.text: The backup plan for civilization fits inside a mountain.

quiz.question: What does the Svalbard Global Seed Vault store?
options: Crop seeds as insurance against famine and disaster
